label: SEO Audit
description: A general audit of organic search performance and opportunities.

label: Keyword Ranking Analysis
description: Analysis of keyword drops, opportunities, and competitor movement.

label: Local SEO Audit
description: Review of local search visibility, citations, and map presence.

label: Google Business Profile Optimization
description: Optimization of Google Business Profile fields and local signals.

label: Technical SEO Audit
description: Review of indexing, crawlability, metadata, redirects, and technical issues.

label: Speed Optimization
description: Performance improvements aimed at faster load times and better UX.

label: Content Strategy
description: Planning content topics, service pages, and topical coverage.

label: Content Refresh
description: Improving existing content for freshness, quality, and intent match.

label: Backlink Strategy
description: Planning authority-building and backlink improvement efforts.

label: Conversion Audit
description: Review of pages and funnels to improve lead generation from traffic.
